title: Define Field Syntax
text: Define Field Syntax Define the field syntax definitions for a field, which determine the format required for data entered in the field. At runtime, the syntax is checked, and some changes may be automatically applied, to ensure that it complies with the specified format. If you have created modeled field syntax definitions, click Use modeled to select the one you want to use. This is useful when you want to use the same syntax for multiple fields. Properties Name Description Entry Format Edit Display Prompt Dimmed Uppercase Lowercase Mandatory Overstrike Auto Jump Minimum Field Length Maximum Field Length Characters Allowed Use IME for input Related Links Modeled Properties Modeled properties are development objects that can be reused in selected properties to enforce consistent patterns for storing, entering, and displaying data. You model properties for the Database Interface, Field Syntax, and Field Layout properties. Field Syntax Codes Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
